title: Crane and Tower Operators
description: Operate mechanical boom and cable or tower and cable equipment to lift and move materials, machines, or products in many directions.

tasks.text: Determine load weights and check them against lifting capacities to prevent overload.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move levers, depress foot pedals, or turn dials to operate cranes, cherry pickers, electromagnets, or other moving equipment for lifting, moving, or placing loads.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect and adjust crane mechanisms or lifting accessories to prevent malfunctions or damage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect cables or grappling devices for wear and install or replace cables, as needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Direct helpers engaged in placing blocking or outrigging under cranes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Clean, lubricate, and maintain mechanisms such as cables, pulleys, or grappling devices, making repairs, as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load or unload bundles from trucks, or move containers to storage bins, using moving equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review daily work or delivery schedules to determine orders, sequences of deliveries, or special loading instructions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect bundle packaging for conformance to regulations or customer requirements, and remove and batch packaging tickets.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Direct truck drivers backing vehicles into loading bays and cover, uncover, or secure loads for delivery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Weigh bundles, using floor scales, and record weights for company records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.
